servinfo.title: Power Door Lock System Symptom Diagnosis

condition.ptxt: Only one door cannot be locked / unlocked

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)
Faulty door lock assembly (including door lock open rod and door lock wires)

action.ptxt: Replace door lock open rod and door lock wires.

ps.ptxt: Damaged and deformed inside door handle

condition.ptxt: All doors cannot be locked / unlocked

action.ptxt: Refer to Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits .
Refer to Inspection of Keyless Start Control Module and Its Circuits .

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Refer to Power Door Lock Switch Inspection .

condition.ptxt: All door cannot be locked / unlocked by only remote controller

action.ptxt: Refer to Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits .
Refer to Inspection of Keyless Start Control Module and Its Circuits .

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Refer to Keyless Entry Receiver Inspection .

condition.ptxt: All door cannot be locked / unlocked by only request switches

ps.ptxt: Faulty registration of remote controller to keyless start control module

action.ptxt: Refer to Inspection of Keyless Start Control Module and Its Circuits .
Refer to Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits .

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Refer to Inspection of Keyless Start Control Module and Its Circuits .

condition.ptxt: Faulty answer-back function of hazard light

action.ptxt: Refer to Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits .

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)
